query: INSERT INTO backup_reports (agent_id, repo_id, started_at, finished_at, status, original_size, compressed_size, deduplicated_size, repo_unique_csize, files_processed, duration_secs, error_message, warnings, borg_version, matched, archive_name, borg_command) SELECT t.agent_id, t.repo_id, t.started_at, t.finished_at, t.status, t.original_size, t.compressed_size, t.deduplicated_size, t.repo_unique_csize, t.files_processed, t.duration_secs, t.error_message, ARRAY[]::text[], t.borg_version, t.matched, t.archive_name, t.borg_command FROM UNNEST($1::bigint[], $2::bigint[], $3::timestamptz[], $4::timestamptz[], $5::text[], $6::bigint[], $7::bigint[], $8::bigint[], $9::bigint[], $10::bigint[], $11::bigint[], $12::text[], $13::text[], $14::bool[], $15::text[], $16::text[]) AS t(agent_id, repo_id, started_at, finished_at, status, original_size, compressed_size, deduplicated_size, repo_unique_csize, files_processed, duration_secs, error_message, borg_version, matched, archive_name, borg_command) ON CONFLICT (repo_id, agent_id, started_at, archive_name) WHERE archive_name IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING
